message:
fix: box Commands enum to prevent stack overflow in debug builds

- Wrap Cli.command in Box<Commands> to reduce stack frame size — the
  56-variant Commands enum caused stack overflow in debug/test builds
  where enum layout is not optimized
- Add unbox step (`command.map(|b| *b)`) in run() before the main match
- Update all 30+ test match patterns to unbox before matching
- Sync beads issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
